title: Behavior Summon Entity
description: Allows the mob to attack the player by summoning other entities.

summon_choices.description: Weighted list of possible summon behaviors.

cast_duration.description: Time in seconds the entity casts before summoning.

cooldown_time.description: Time in seconds before this choice can be re-selected.

do_casting.description: Whether the entity plays a casting animation.

filters.description: Filter conditions that must be met for this choice to be picked.

max_activation_range.description: Maximum distance in blocks from the target at which the choice activates.

min_activation_range.description: Minimum distance in blocks from the target at which the choice activates.

base_delay.description: Delay in seconds before this step.

delay_per_summon.description: Additional delay in seconds per summoned entity.

entity_lifespan.description: Lifetime in seconds of the summoned entity.

num_entities_spawned.description: Number of entities to spawn in this step.

sound_event.description: Sound played when this step runs.

summon_cap.description: Maximum number of entities to keep alive within the cap radius.

summon_cap_radius.description: Radius in blocks of the summon cap.

target.description: Target subject for the spawned entity. Defaults to 'self'.

start_sound_event.description: Sound played when the choice starts.
